tidyusmacro 0.2.0.9000

tidyusmacro: Downloading and Cleaning U.S. Macroeconomic Data

Source: R/tidyusmacro-package.R
tidyusmacro-package.Rd

Utilities to retrieve and tidy U.S. macroeconomic data from public government data providers, returning consistent tibbles ready for modeling and graphics.

Data download functions

getFRED

One or more series from FRED, merged by date.

getBLSFiles

BLS flat files (CPI, CES, CPS, JOLTS, ECI, CEX, and others), merged with their lookup tables.

getNIPAFiles

BEA NIPA flat files, expanded to one row per table line.

getPCEInflation

PCE price indices with nominal-share weights and growth rates.

getDallasTrimPCE

Component panel underlying the Dallas Fed trimmed-mean PCE inflation rate.

getUnrateFRED

Unemployment rate built from FRED levels.

Analysis and plotting helpers

logLinearProjection

Log-linear trend projection for use inside dplyr::mutate().

date_breaks_gg, date_breaks_n

Date axis breaks anchored to the data.

theme_esp

Economic Security Project ggplot2 theme and color scales.

Included datasets

cesDiffusionIndex, dallasTrimPCEcomponents.

See also
